column2: # ---- Helper: R² vs distance (robust, no lm warnings) ----
# Pairwise R² using correlation^2 (skip diagonals; keep unique unordered pairs)
if (s1 == s2) return(tibble(Site1 = s1, Site2 = s2, R2 = NA_real_))
dfp <- wide_df %>% select(x = all_of(s1), y = all_of(s2)) %>% drop_na()
r2  <- if (nrow(dfp) > 2) cor(dfp$x, dfp$y)^2 else NA_real_
tibble(Site1 = s1, Site2 = s2, R2 = r2)
# NOTE: names in 'by' must be columns in x (r2_tbl), values in y (coords_min):
# and epa_coords has columns: Site, Latitude, Longitude
title = "Spatial Agreement vs. Distance between EPA Sites",
subtitle = "Pairwise R² of daily PM2.5 vs. distance",
